changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resource_files ( id bigint NOT NULL, created_by character varying(255) , created_date timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL, last_modified_by character varying(255) , last_modified_date timestamp(6) without time zone, deleted_by character varying(255) , deleted_date timestamp(6) without time zone, is_delete boolean DEFAULT false, file_name character varying(100) , file_type character varying(50) , path character varying(255) , active boolean default true, size bigint, sort_order Integer default 0, resource_type character varying(50) , usage_type character varying(50) , owner_entity character varying(50) , owner_id bigint, CONSTRAINT resource_files_p_key PRIMARY KEY (id) );
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS resource_files_id_seq INCREMENT 1 START 1 NO MINVALUE NO MAXVALUE CACHE 1 OWNED BY resource_files.id;
